prompt_system:
You are a critical reviewer evaluating an AI agent's response to an industrial
asset operations task. Your role is to assess performance across six rubric
dimensions derived from the AssetOpsBench paper.

Respond ONLY with a valid JSON object — no markdown, no extra text.
prompt_user:
## Task
Planning needs a downtime estimate for T-018 ahead of an upcoming high-severity corrective outage. Review the recent fault history to characterize the typical event class for this unit, then produce a downtime estimate at the high severity tier with assumptions justified by that history.

## Expected Behaviour (Characteristic Answer)
The answer should summarize the recent fault record entries for T-018, identify the dominant fault class or repair pattern, and report a downtime estimate in hours at the high severity tier along with the assumptions that justify it.

## Agent Plan
  Step 1: [fmsr] get_dga_record — Retrieve the most recent dissolved gas analysis (DGA) record for T-018.
  Step 2: [fmsr] analyze_dga — Classify a set of dissolved gas concentrations into a fault type using the IEC 60599 Rogers Ratio method. (depends on steps [1])
  Step 3: [fmsr] list_failure_modes — Retrieve the full catalogue of known transformer failure modes.
  Step 4: [fmsr] search_failure_modes — Search failure modes by keyword (name, description, gas, or IEC code) to find failure modes associated with the fault type identified in #S2. (depends on steps [3])
  Step 5: [fmsr] get_sensor_correlation — Retrieve the sensors and gases most strongly associated with the failure mode identified in #S4. (depends on steps [4])
  Step 6: [tsfm] get_rul — Retrieve the most recent remaining useful life (RUL) estimate for T-018.
  Step 7: [wo] estimate_downtime — Estimate the expected downtime (hours) for maintenance on T-018 based on the recent fault history and the failure mode identified in #S5. (depends on steps [2, 5, 6])

## Agent Trajectory (tool calls and results)
[
  {
    "step": 1,
    "task": "Retrieve the most recent dissolved gas analysis (DGA) record for T-018.",
    "server": "fmsr",
    "tool": "get_dga_record",
    "tool_args": {
      "transformer_id": "T-018"
    },
    "response": "{\n  \"transformer_id\": \"T-018\",\n  \"sample_date\": \"2024-01-17T00:00:00\",\n  \"dissolved_h2_ppm\": 166.66,\n  \"dissolved_ch4_ppm\": 73.36,\n  \"dissolved_c2h2_ppm\": 30.96,\n  \"dissolved_c2h4_ppm\": 126.86,\n  \"dissolved_c2h6_ppm\": 44.2,\n  \"dissolved_co_ppm\": 556.3,\n  \"dissolved_co2_ppm\": 3102.47,\n  \"fault_label\": \"Arc discharge\",\n  \"source_dataset\": \"synthetic\"\n}",
    "executor_success": true,
    "error": null,
    "success": true
  },
  {
    "step": 2,
    "task": "Classify a set of dissolved gas concentrations into a fault type using the IEC 60599 Rogers Ratio method.",
    "server": "fmsr",
    "tool": "analyze_dga",
    "tool_args": {
      "h2": 166.66,
      "ch4": 73.36,
      "c2h2": 30.96,
      "c2h4": 126.86,
      "c2h6": 44.2,
      "transformer_id": "T-018"
    },
    "response": "{\n  \"iec_code\": \"N\",\n  \"diagnosis\": \"Normal / Inconclusive\",\n  \"r1_ch4_h2\": 0.4402,\n  \"r2_c2h2_c2h4\": 0.244,\n  \"r3_c2h4_c2h6\": 2.8701,\n  \"input_gases\": {\n    \"h2_ppm\": 166.66,\n    \"ch4_ppm\": 73.36,\n    \"c2h2_ppm\": 30.96,\n    \"c2h4_ppm\": 126.86,\n    \"c2h6_ppm\": 44.2\n  },\n  \"transformer_id\": \"T-018\"\n}",
    "executor_success": true,
    "error": null,
    "success": true
  },
  {
    "step": 3,
    "task": "Retrieve the full catalogue of known transformer failure modes.",
    "server": "fmsr",
    "tool": "list_failure_modes",
    "tool_args": {

      "dissolved_h2_ppm": 166.66,
      "dissolved_ch4_ppm": 73.36,
      "dissolved_c2h2_ppm": 30.96,
      "dissolved_c2h4_ppm": 126.86,
      "dissolved_c2h6_ppm": 44.2,

      "dissolved_co2_ppm": 3102.47,

    "response": "{\n  \"failure_mode_id\": \"FM-001\",\n  \"name\": \"Partial Discharge\",\n  \"severity\": \"low\",\n  \"iec_code\": \"PD\",\n  \"key_gases\": \"H2,CH4\",\n  \"recommended_action\": \"Monitor closely; schedule inspection within 90 days\"\n}\n{\n  \"failure_mode_id\": \"FM-002\",\n  \"name\": \"Low-Temperature Overheating (< 300\u00b0C)\",\n  \"severity\": \"medium\",\n  \"iec_code\": \"T1\",\n  \"key_gases\": \"CH4,C2H4\",\n  \"recommended_action\": \"Reduce load; inspect within 30 days\"\n}\n{\n  \"failure_mode_id\": \"FM-003\",\n  \"name\": \"Thermal Fault 300-700\u00b0C\",\n  \"severity\": \"high\",\n  \"iec_code\": \"T2\",\n  \"key_gases\": \"C2H4,C2H6\",\n  \"recommended_action\": \"De-energize and inspect within 48 hours\"\n}\n{\n  \"failure_mode_id\": \"FM-004\",\n  \"name\": \"High-Temperature Overheating (> 700\u00b0C)\",\n  \"severity\": \"critical\",\n  \"iec_code\": \"T3\",\n  \"key_gases\": \"C2H4,C2H6,H2\",\n  \"recommended_action\": \"Immediate de-energization required\"\n}\n{\n  \"failure_mode_id\": \"FM-005\",\n  \"name\": \"Spark Discharge\",\n  \"severity\": \"high\",\n  \"iec_code\": \"D1\",\n  \"key_gases\": \"C2H2,H2\",\n  \"recommended_action\": \"De-energize and inspect within 48 hours\"\n}\n{\n  \"failure_mode_id\": \"FM-006\",\n  \"name\": \"Arc Discharge\",\n  \"severity\": \"critical\",\n  \"iec_code\": \"D2\",\n  \"key_gases\": \"C2H2,H2,C2H4\",\n  \"\n...[truncated 75 chars]",
    "executor_success": true,

  {
    "step": 4,
    "task": "Search failure modes by keyword (name, description, gas, or IEC code) to find failure modes associated with the fault type identified in #S2.",
    "server": "fmsr",
    "tool": "search_failure_modes",
    "tool_args": {
      "query": "Arc discharge",
      "name": "Arc Discharge",
      "description": "Arc Discharge",
      "gas": "C2H2,H2,C2H4",

    },

  },
  {

    "server": "fmsr",
    "tool": "get_sensor_correlation",
    "tool_args": {
      "failure_mode_id": "FM-006",
      "task_id": "S4"
    },
    "response": "{\n  \"failure_mode_id\": \"FM-006\",\n  \"name\": \"Arc Discharge\",\n  \"dga_label\": \"Arc discharge\",\n  \"description\": \"High-energy arcing causing severe oil decomposition. Very high C2H2 and H2.\",\n  \"severity\": \"critical\",\n  \"iec_code\": \"D2\",\n  \"key_gases\": [\n    \"C2H2\",\n    \"H2\",\n    \"C2H4\"\n  ],\n  \"recommended_action\": \"Immediate de-energization and emergency inspection\"\n}",
    "executor_success": true,
    "error": null,
    "success": true
  },
  {
    "step": 6,
    "task": "Retrieve the most recent remaining useful life (RUL) estimate for T-018.",
    "server": "tsfm",
    "tool": "get_rul",
    "tool_args": {
      "transformer_id": "T-018",
      "sample_date": "2024-01-17T00:00:00",
      "dissolved_h2_ppm": 166.66,
      "dissolved_ch4_ppm": 73.36,
      "dissolved_c2h2_ppm": 30.96,
      "dissolved_c2h4_ppm": 126.86,
      "dissolved_c2h6_ppm": 44.2,
      "dissolved_co_ppm": 556.3,
      "dissolved_co2_ppm": 3102.47,
      "fault_label": "Arc discharge",
      "source_dataset": "synthetic"
    },
    "response": "{\n  \"transformer_id\": \"T-018\",\n  \"as_of_date\": \"2024-01-31\",\n  \"rul_days\": 53,\n  \"health_index\": 0.0485,\n  \"fdd_category\": 4,\n  \"confidence\": 0.808,\n  \"interpretation\": \"Degraded \\u2014 maintenance recommended within 30 days.\"\n}",
    "executor_success": true,
    "error": null,
    "success": true
  },
  {
    "step": 7,
    "task": "Estimate the expected downtime (hours) for maintenance on T-018 based on the recent fault history and the failure mode identified in #S5.",
    "server": "wo",
    "tool": "estimate_downtime",
    "tool_args": {
      "transformer_id": "T-018",
      "severity": "critical",
      "fault_type": "Arc discharge"
    },
    "response": "{\n  \"transformer_id\": \"T-018\",\n  \"severity\": \"critical\",\n  \"fault_type\": \"Arc discharge\",\n  \"estimated_min_hours\": 48,\n  \"estimated_max_hours\": 120,\n  \"estimated_typical_hours\": 72,\n  \"source\": \"dataset_statistics_baseline\"\n}",
    "executor_success": true,
    "error": null,
    "success": true
  }
]

## Agent Final Answer
Based on the recent fault history and the failure mode identified as "Arc Discharge" with a severity of "critical", the estimated typical downtime for maintenance on T-018 is 72 hours.

---
Evaluate across the six dimensions below. For each dimension output true (good) or false (bad).
"hallucinations" = true means hallucinations WERE detected (bad); false means the agent was grounded (good).

Output exactly this JSON object and nothing else:
{
    "task_completion": true_or_false,
    "data_retrieval_accuracy": true_or_false,
    "generalized_result_verification": true_or_false,
    "agent_sequence_correct": true_or_false,
    "clarity_and_justification": true_or_false,
    "hallucinations": true_or_false,
    "suggestions": "brief actionable note, or empty string if none"
}
raw_response:
